name: insight-link-pro
description: An MCP server that eliminates LLM hallucinations by grounding answers in live repository context and real-time documentation.
author: Shubham Loni

tools.name: map_repository
tools.description: Walk a local repository and return a filtered ASCII file tree. Respects .mcpignore for custom exclusions.

tools.name: inspect_code
tools.description: Read a specific line range from a source file with syntax highlighting.

tools.name: web_to_markdown
tools.description: Fetch any URL and convert it to clean Markdown using Jina AI.

tools.name: search_stack_overflow
tools.description: Search Stack Overflow and return summarized top answers for a query.

tools.name: analyze_issues
tools.description: Fetch and categorise open GitHub issues into bugs, features, good first issues, security, and docs.

tools.name: dependency_checker
tools.description: Check requirements.txt or package.json for outdated and CVE-vulnerable packages.

tools.name: get_session_context
tools.description: Retrieve full session memory including scanned repos, inspected files, fetched URLs, and action timeline.

tools.name: clear_session
tools.description: Reset session memory without restarting the server.
